statement.en: Development of numerical toolsets for the democratization of Radioactive Particle Tracking technology
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a provisional research thesis (2026, recent) under embargo with abstract withheld. The claimed contribution (numerical toolsets for RPT democratization) is substantive but cannot be evaluated without access to methods, results, or validation data. Classification as FLOWING reflects: (1) preprint/thesis status not yet peer-validated, (2) embargo preventing full evaluation, (3) temporal proximity suggesting active development.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 放射能の軌跡は時間とともに拡散し、やがて万物に平等に行き渡る。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 目に見えぬ粒子の踊りが、同心円として民衆の手に届く。
